creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Lorenzo Salvadore from comment #13)
> I added the comment for gcc, but I still have to discuss about the USE block.

Apologies, I was not clear in my previous note.  What you propose is
perfectly fine (and what I actually had in mind).


Personally I would write

   USE_GCC=       yes   # misc/biblesync is built with GCC.

but you know I'm in for more full stops than others ;-), and you are the
maintainer of this port so your style preference matters more.

(We usually leave a space after the # and the name of the project is GCC;
those are the two changes I'd prefer to see.) 

Please go ahead and commit including the appropriate PR: and Approved by:;
thank you!
